title: clinopodium bolivianum subsp. bolivianum
intro: Clinopodium bolivianum subsp. bolivianum, also known as Bolivian wild mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium bolivianum subsp. bolivianum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
